name: Enhancement
tagline: Boost a creature's or object's natural capabilities.

baseAbility.name: Enhance
baseAbility.description: Standard action, close range. Grant a weapon, suit of armor, shield, or up to 50 pieces of grouped ammunition a +1 enhancement bonus (improving by +1 per 4 CL). Lasts while you concentrate, or spend 1 SP to sustain it for 1 min/CL without concentrating. Unwilling creatures/intelligent items get a Will save to resist.

talents.name: Physical Enhancement
talents.description: New enhancement: grant a creature a bonus to a physical ability score.

talents.name: Mental Enhancement
talents.description: New enhancement: grant a creature a bonus to a mental ability score.

talents.name: Resilient Enhancement
talents.description: New enhancement: grant a creature an untyped bonus to one saving throw.

talents.name: Animate Object
talents.description: New enhancement: bring an object to life as a construct that obeys simple commands, sized according to your caster level.

talents.name: Spectral Enhancement
talents.description: New enhancement: grant gear the ghost touch property, or make an object solid/graspable to incorporeal creatures.

talents.name: Weapon Special Ability
talents.description: New enhancement: grant a weapon a specific magic weapon special ability (such as flaming or keen) instead of just a flat bonus.

talents.name: Armor Special Ability
talents.description: New enhancement: grant armor a specific magic armor special ability instead of just a flat bonus.

talents.name: Mass Enhancement
talents.description: Apply the same enhancement to 1 extra target per 2 CL (min 1) at once.

talents.name: Ranged Enhancement
talents.description: Enhance works at medium range instead of close. Repeatable to extend range further.

talents.name: Enhance Creature
talents.description: Weapon/armor enhancements can be applied directly to a creature's natural weapons or natural armor instead of requiring gear.
